preferredPolicy.baseline: corrected D2 artifact + corrected D2 CDS archive
preferredPolicy.candidate: corrected D2 + raw reducer artifact + freshly trained D2R CDS archive
preferredPolicy.reason: Preserves historical Doctor runtime mode and avoids comparing unlike policies.

allowedDiagnosticPolicy.boundary: Diagnostic only; not comparable to historical Doctor corrected fat-JAR/CDS result.

forbiddenComparisons: old D2 CDS archive reused with D2R raw-reduced artifact
historical D2 CDS result compared to new D2R no-CDS result
CDS baseline compared to no-CDS candidate
artifact smoke described as runtime evidence
recommendedNextAction: Use the comparable CDS path first. If retraining remains blocked after image/config/database recovery, run an explicitly labeled no-CDS diagnostic screen.
